rule: Keynote slides can prove what NVIDIA publicly staged, named, compared, and emphasized at that event.
allowed_use: Use as stagecraft, chronology, and NVIDIA-framed claim evidence.
blocked_use: Do not use as independent proof that the claim is true, delivered, adopted, economical, or neutral.
next_verification: Pair major slide claims with press releases, filings, benchmark pages, customer sources, or independent reporting.

rule: Roadmap visuals preserve future-facing dates and generation names as NVIDIA's plan at the time.
allowed_use: Label all future items as roadmap or announced at event date.
blocked_use: Do not write future roadmap items as shipped history or guaranteed delivery.
next_verification: Check later official releases and product pages before final prose.

rule: Performance charts can support a caption that NVIDIA made a performance argument.
allowed_use: Use redrawn cards with axis/source caveats after exact values are captured.
blocked_use: Do not normalize, rank, or compare against competitors without methodology and independent benchmark context.
next_verification: Extract exact chart values only from official deck/video and corroborate with technical docs where possible.

rule: Partner/logo slides establish that NVIDIA displayed a partner ecosystem surface.
allowed_use: Use as ecosystem-stagecraft evidence with exact event attribution.
blocked_use: Do not infer active deployment, purchase volume, revenue, customer satisfaction, or technical validation.
next_verification: Seek partner press releases or case studies before naming outcomes.

rule: AI factory facility visuals can show the shift from chip to power/cooling/building rhetoric.
blocked_use: Do not assert PUE, grid benefit, speed-to-build, watts per token, or cost savings from slides alone.
next_verification: Corroborate through site permits, utility filings, partner releases, or independent engineering sources.

rule: Timecoded video/transcript surfaces are needed for 2024/2025 final page-like provenance.
allowed_use: Use current source inventory as acquisition plan until captured.
blocked_use: Do not cite exact spoken wording or timecodes from search snippets.
next_verification: Run a dedicated browser/on-demand capture pass for exact timestamps and transcript text.
